action_set_definitions.name: get_system_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current system time and date, which is essential for determining the 'earliest possible time'.

action_set_definitions.name: search_room_by_name
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for a specific room by its name to retrieve its unique identifier and specific metadata.

room_name.description: The name of the suite (e.g., 'Clinical Suite 4B').

action_set_definitions.name: verify_clinical_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if a room has been officially cleared for clinical use following sanitization protocols (e.g., after infectious disease exposure).

room_id.description: The unique identifier for the room.

action_set_definitions.name: check_equipment_readiness
action_set_definitions.description: Confirms the operational status of specific categories of specialized medical equipment in a room.

room_id.description: The unique identifier for the room.

equipment_category.description: The type of equipment to check (e.g., 'medical imaging').

action_set_definitions.name: get_room_schedule
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of bookings for a specific room on a specific date to identify availability.

room_id.description: The unique identifier for the room.

date.description: The date to check in YYYY-MM-DD format.

action_set_definitions.name: create_booking
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes a reservation in the system for a specific user and event.

room_id.description: The identifier of the room to book.

attendee.description: The name of the lead clinician (e.g., 'Dr. Aris').

duration_minutes.description: Duration of the meeting in minutes.

state_description.rooms: A list of available meeting rooms and their metadata.
state_description.bookings: Current active reservations in the system.
state_description.current_system_time: The current reference time in the simulation (ISO 8601).
